post.description: Authenticate with email and auth hash, returns JWT tokens and encrypted crypto material
Revoke the refresh token to end the session
Change master password and re-encrypt private keys. Requires step-up.

parameters.description: Old and new auth hashes with re-encrypted keys
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns salt and KDF parameters needed to derive the auth hash client-side

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair
Create a new user account with client-side derived crypto material
Re-verify master password to get a step-up token for sensitive operations
Verify a TOTP code to activate two-factor authentication
Generate a new TOTP secret and QR code URL. Requires step-up authentication.
Validate a TOTP code during the two-factor authentication step of login

get.description: Returns all vaults the authenticated user has access to

post.description: Create a new vault with an encrypted vault key

get.description: List all folders in the specified vault

post.description: Create a new encrypted folder in the specified vault

put.description: Update the encrypted name of a folder

delete.description: Delete a folder (items in the folder are not deleted, just unlinked)

get.description: List all active (non-trashed) items in a vault with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by item type (login, note, card, identity, api_key, ssh_key, passkey)
parameters.name: itemType

post.description: Create a new encrypted item in the specified vault

404.description: Vault not found or not a member

get.description: Retrieve a single encrypted item by ID

delete.description: Move an item to trash (soft delete)

get.description: List all soft-deleted items in a vault

delete.description: Permanently delete a trashed item. Requires step-up authentication.

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted item from trash

encryptedPrivateKey.description: User crypto material for client-side key hydration (§4.2)
